title: A Minecraft Movie Soundtrack
description: Adds the full Minecraft Movie soundtrack to the game as music discs, found by trading and in some chests.
body:
With the new Minecraft movie out, nobody has yet added the soundtrack into the game. Well, today, I just did, wasting my whole night. lmao
All 25 songs, including 2 trailer songs, are added as music discs. All of these can be found through chests and trading with wandering traders, farmers, etc.
